name: Claude Opus 4.5
note: Efficiency-focused flagship: 67% price cut vs Opus 4.1 and state-of-the-art 80.9% SWE-bench Verified at launch.

results.notes: AIME 2025 without code tools; Anthropic flagged that decontamination efforts for AIME were not fully successful

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released model via anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5: release date 2025-11-24, pricing $5/$25 per million input/output tokens (67% cut vs Opus 4.1), 200K context, SWE-bench Verified 80.9% all literally appear on the official page. Cross-checked all vellum.ai-sourced rows by re-fetching that page directly: GPQA Diamond 87.0%, MMLU 90.8%, MMMU 80.7%, HLE (with search) ~43.2% all literally present. Confirmed AIME 93% (without code tools) and the AIME decontamination caveat by fetching the LessWrong post directly ('93% without code and 100% with Python'; Anthropic disclosed 'rephrased versions of at least some AIME questions... persisted in the training corpus'). Confirmed Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score of 70 and #2 rank (behind Gemini 3 Pro at 73, tied GPT-5.1) by fetching artificialanalysis.ai directly. No changes to values were needed; architecture/params remain correctly marked null/undisclosed since Anthropic does not publish these.
